/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -shared  -Wl,--no-undefined -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/udpParser_lib.dir/link.d -Wl,-soname,libudpParser_lib.so -o libudpParser_lib.so CMakeFiles/udpParser_lib.dir/UdpParser/udp_parser.cc.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/kilabor/isaac-go2-ros2/build/hesai_ros_driver/src/driver/HesaiLidar_SDK_2.0/libhesai: libplatutils_lib.so liblog_lib.so
